
# 2023-02-18 07:51:39.248995
+restar

# 2023-02-18 07:51:44.416687
+restart

# 2023-02-18 07:51:48.136168
+ls

# 2023-02-18 07:51:50.060063
+cd ..

# 2023-02-18 07:51:51.768688
+ls

# 2023-02-18 07:52:03.674787
+ls

# 2023-02-18 07:52:06.042958
+cd ..

# 2023-02-18 07:52:28.479040
+az account list

# 2023-02-18 07:52:49.232114
+az account list --output

# 2023-02-18 07:53:10.680304
+az account list --output --output table

# 2023-02-18 07:53:15.896924
+az account list  --output table

# 2023-02-18 07:53:41.682540
+help

# 2023-02-18 07:53:48.257222
+exit
